positive: A highly stylized, seamless pattern design featuring abstracted, bioluminescent forest flora and fauna. The main subject should be delicate, intertwined vines, glowing mushrooms, and stylized deep-sea corals, rendered in a minimalist, Art Nouveau aesthetic. The color palette should be deep sapphire blues, emerald greens, amethyst purples, and stark glowing cyan accents, set against a very deep, near-black background. Composition must be circular and balanced, emphasizing strong contrasts between the glowing elements and the dark background. Clean lines, vector-art quality, high contrast, suitable for repeat textile printing, highly detailed, symmetrical arrangement, flat graphic look.
negative: blur, grain, noise, signature, text, watermark, logos, low detail, poor anatomy, extra limbs, smudge, artifacts, photo-realistic, messy, cluttered
